reviews.comment:
La app de YPF anda a veces, el famoso sandwich casero es más caro que el sushi.

Vayan en frente medio en diagonal camino a Esquel, hay una almacén/casa pintado de azul, compran un pan casero completo, 150 de paleta, 200 de queso por el precio de dos sandwichs de la estación. La señora tiene mesitas adentro y es súper simpática (a diferencia de la YPF que parece que les haces un favor comprarle algo)

(Translated by Google)
The YPF app works sometimes, and their famous homemade sandwich is more expensive than sushi.

Go diagonally across the street on the way to Esquel; there's a small shop/house painted blue. Buy a whole homemade roll, 150 pesos of ham, and 200 pesos of cheese for the price of two sandwiches from the station. The lady has tables inside and is super friendly (unlike at YPF, where they act like you're doing them a favor by buying something).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcUxPXzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para repostar combustible luego de un largo viaje. Tiene una tienda serviclub muy surtida y lo mejor que sirven son los famosos sándwiches de jamón crudo. Una delicia y lo más llevado por la gente que concurre alli. La atención del personal es cordial y amable. Buena atención en general.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to refuel after a long trip. It has a well-stocked convenience store, and their famous prosciutto sandwiches are the best thing about it. They're delicious and a big hit with customers. The staff is friendly and helpful. Good service overall.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNzVTM3RRRRAB
